name: Ethan Carter
bio: Roommate from first year of university. We used to pull all-nighters for exams and eat biryani at midnight. Still the first person I call when something big happens.

name: Sophia Bennett
bio: Senior dev at my first internship. She taught me how to actually read error messages and not panic. We grab coffee online every few weeks and catch up on life.

name: Lucas Morgan
bio: Grew up on the same street. We learned to ride bikes together and got into trouble together too. Now lives in Chittagong but we used to talk every week.

name: Olivia Hansen
bio: We survived the same nightmare databases course together. She's now doing her Master's in Sweden and always sends photos of snow like it's still magical.

name: Noah Mitchell
bio: Met at a local hackathon in 2023. We hold each other accountable on side projects and share resources every week. He's building a SaaS and I'm rooting for him.

name: Emma Clarke
bio: Best friend from high school. We used to write notes to each other in class and laugh until teachers got annoyed. Life got busy but she always crosses my mind.

name: James Holloway
bio: Built our final year project together — a smart parking system that actually worked. He's thorough, reliable, and always has strong opinions about code structure. Good ones.

name: Chloe Whitfield
bio: Freelance illustrator and one of the most genuinely creative people I know. We brainstorm ideas together — she does the visuals, I think about the logic. Great balance.

name: Ryan Caldwell
bio: Technically a distant cousin but feels more like a brother. We grew up going to the same family events and somehow ended up in the same field. Now we swap job advice and complain about the market together.

name: Zoe Hartman
bio: We were inseparable in class 9 and 10. She moved to India for college and we lost touch gradually. Every time I see an old photo I think I should message her — and now I finally should.

name: Daniel Foster
bio: We started as colleagues on the same frontend team and became genuine friends over late-night deployments and shared frustration over browser bugs. He moved to a different company but we still do weekly catch-ups over call.

name: Ava Richardson
bio: Met during orientation week and immediately bonded over a shared hatred of 8 AM classes. She was the most organized person in any group project and somehow made deadlines feel less terrifying.
